rationale_source: F1.LA broker_correction tier wins per R10-G OBJECTIVE-vs-INTENT framing; loan_app source ($260k) is not suppressed because correction is small (within 30% threshold)

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction asserts $295,000. F1.LA broker_correction tier wins per R10-G INTENT framing; loan_app source ($260k) corroborates but is shadowed by correction.

discrepancyHold.rationale: Discrepancy ($260k vs $295k) = 11.9% from broker source, below R11-B-1 Layer 1 30% threshold. No F2.DH activation.

must_include.rationale: Final canonical loan_amount per F1.LA broker_correction tier.
